response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but the role specifically requires a senior C++ developer with deep STL, multi-threading, message broker, and industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) expertise. C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments nearly 18 years ago, with no recent industrial automation, IoT protocol (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), or SDL/IEC 62443 experience. The skill mismatch is substantial despite strong general engineering credentials.
strengths: Extensive senior-level full-stack and distributed systems experience
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops)
Some IoT/GIS and event-driven platform exposure via GISCollective
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and ~18 years old (NI LabWindows, 2007-2008)
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
Missing core stack: MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, message brokers, Azure cloud services

key_factors.factor: Lack of recent C++ / STL experience
No industrial automation or IEC 62443 / SDL background
Strong general senior engineering and architecture experience
